    category: network_connection
    product: generic
detection:

            - 4625
            - 4648

        LogonType: 3
    condition: selection
falsepositives:
    - Legitimate administrative access
    - Service account activity
level: high
items.kql_query:
// SENTINEL APEX — CVE-2026-58138 — Anomalous Activity Detection
// Product: Web Application | Generated: 2026-07-15T21:14:27Z
let lookback = 1d;
SecurityEvent
| where TimeGenerated > ago(lookback)
| where EventID in (4625, 4648, 4728, 4740, 4776)
| summarize FailureCount = count(), DistinctTargets = dcount(TargetUserName)
    by IpAddress, bin(TimeGenerated, 1h)
| where FailureCount > 10 or DistinctTargets > 5
| extend Severity = "MEDIUM", CVE = "CVE-2026-58138", RuleSource = "SENTINEL-APEX"
| order by TimeGenerated desc
items.suricata_rule: alert http $EXTERNAL_NET any -> $HTTP_SERVERS $HTTP_PORTS (msg:"SENTINEL-APEX CVE-2026-58138 Exploitation Attempt - GENERIC"; flow:established,to_server; content:"|90 90 90 90|"; rawbytes; threshold:type threshold, track by_src, count 3, seconds 60; classtype:web-application-attack; sid:5529806; rev:1; metadata:created_at 2026-07-15, source SENTINEL-APEX-v166.2;)

items.title: CVE-2026-46817: Oracle E-Business Suite Improper Privilege Management Vulnerability
items.description: Oracle E-Business Suite contains an improper privilege management vulnerability that allows an unauthenticated attacker with network access via HTTP to compromise Oracle Payments. Successful attacks of this vulnerability can result in takeover of Oracle Payments. | Vendor: Oracle | Product: E-Business Suite | Action: Apply mitigations in accordance with vendor instructions, ensuring compliance with CISAs BOD 26-04 Prioritizing Security Updates Based on Risk (see URL in Notes) guidance and CISAs Forensics Triage Requirements (see URL in Notes). Follow applicable BOD 26-04 guidance for cloud services or discontinue use of the product if mitigations are unavailable. Stakeholders are responsible for evaluating each asset's internet exposure and ensuring adherence to BOD 26-04 patching guidelines.

items.title: CVE-2023-4346: KNX Association KNX Protocol Connection Authorization Option 1 Overly Restrictive Account Lockout Mechanism Vulnerability
items.description: KNX Association KNX Protocol Connection Authorization Option 1 contains an overly restrictive account lockout mechanism vulnerability that could allow an attacker to purge all devices without additional security options enabled and set a BCU key to lock the device. | Vendor: KNX Association | Product: KNX Protocol Connection Authorization Option 1 | Action: Apply mitigations in accordance with vendor instructions, ensuring compliance with CISAs BOD 26-04 Prioritizing Security Updates Based on Risk (see URL in Notes) guidance and CISAs Forensics Triage Requirements (see URL in Notes). Follow applicable BOD 26-04 guidance for cloud services or discontinue use of the product if mitigations are unavailable. items.title: CVE-2026-15622: A flaw has been found in poco-ai poco-claw up to 0.5.4. Affected is the function get_workspace_file of the file executor
items.description: A flaw has been found in poco-ai poco-claw up to 0.5.4. Affected is the function get_workspace_file of the file executor_manager/app/api/v1/workspace.py of the component Workspace API. Executing a manipulation of the argument user_id can lead to authorization bypass. The attack may be launched remotely. The exploit has been published and may be used. This patch is called 67fcc88505c57f77d3fcf04eb5b89425b10cbf48. Upgrading the affected component is recommended.
items.apex_ai_summary: [MEDIUM] CVE advisory. Risk score 5.3/10. Full APEX AI analysis available to Pro subscribers.

apex.ai_summary: [P3] CVE / Vulnerability - moderate severity (Risk 5.3/10). No MITRE ATT&CK techniques mapped - limited adversarial context. 2 indicators detected - upgrade to Pro for full IOC access. AI confidence: LOW (22%) - limited source data available.
apex.recommended_action: STANDARD PRIORITY - Schedule patch within 7 days. Deploy detection rules. Monitor SIEM for related indicators.

ioc_paywall.message: 2 IOC(s) at 20.0% confidence - unlock with Pro tier.

items.title: CVE-2026-44761: SAP Commerce Cloud could retain a sample OAuth2 client with publicly documented sample credentials originating from samp
items.description: SAP Commerce Cloud could retain a sample OAuth2 client with publicly documented sample credentials originating from sample configuration provided in SAP Help Portal documentation. If left unchanged, an unauthenticated attacker could use these well-known credentials to obtain a valid access token and invoke certain APIs to read and modify data. Successful exploitation results in high impact on confidentiality and integrity, with no impact on availability.
items.apex_ai_summary: [CRITICAL] CVE advisory. Risk score 9.1/10. Full APEX AI analysis available to Pro subscribers.

items.sigma_rule:
title: SENTINEL APEX — CVE-2026-44761 SAP Commerce Cloud could retain a sample OAuth2 client with publi
id: b1d4afd6-ad2c-5c6a-b22e-2e71d9bfa35d
status: experimental
description: |
    Detects exploitation attempts related to CVE-2026-44761 (Web Application).
    Generated by CYBERDUDEBIVASH SENTINEL APEX v166.2.
    Severity: HIGH | Class: RCE
references:
    - https://intel.cyberdudebivash.com
    - https://nvd.nist.gov/vuln/detail/CVE-2026-44761
author: CYBERDUDEBIVASH SENTINEL APEX Detection Engineering
date: 2026/07/15
modified: 2026/07/15
tags:
    - attack.initial_access
logsource:
    category: process_creation
    product: generic
detection:
    selection_process:
        CommandLine|contains:
            - 'cmd.exe /c'
            - 'powershell -enc'
            - '/bin/sh -c'
            - 'wget http'
            - 'curl http'
    selection_webshell:
        Image|endswith:
            - '\cmd.exe'
            - '\powershell.exe'
            - '/bash'
            - '/sh'
        ParentImage|contains:
            - 'w3wp.exe'
            - 'httpd'
            - 'nginx'
            - 'apache2'
            - 'tomcat'
    condition: selection_process or selection_webshell
falsepositives:
    - Legitimate administrative scripts executing via web server
    - Deployment automation tools
level: high
items.kql_query:
// SENTINEL APEX — CVE-2026-44761 Remote Code Execution Detection
// Product: Web Application | Generated: 2026-07-15T21:14:27Z
// Deploy to: Microsoft Sentinel / Defender XDR
let lookback = 1d;
DeviceProcessEvents
| where Timestamp > ago(lookback)
| where (InitiatingProcessFileName in~ ("w3wp.exe", "httpd.exe", "nginx.exe", "tomcat.exe", "java.exe")
    and FileName in~ ("cmd.exe", "powershell.exe", "bash", "sh", "python.exe", "python3"))
    or (ProcessCommandLine has_any ("wget http", "curl http", "certutil -urlcache", "bitsadmin /transfer"))
| project Timestamp, DeviceName, AccountName, FileName, ProcessCommandLine,
          InitiatingProcessFileName, InitiatingProcessCommandLine
| where not(ProcessCommandLine has_any ("update", "install", "backup", "deploy"))  // filter known-good
| extend Severity = "HIGH", CVE = "CVE-2026-44761", RuleSource = "SENTINEL-APEX"
| order by Timestamp desc
items.suricata_rule: alert http $EXTERNAL_NET any -> $HTTP_SERVERS $HTTP_PORTS (msg:"SENTINEL-APEX CVE-2026-44761 Exploitation Attempt - RCE"; flow:established,to_server; content:"/bin/sh"; nocase; content:"cmd.exe"; nocase; threshold:type threshold, track by_src, count 3, seconds 60; classtype:web-application-attack; sid:7939676; rev:1; metadata:created_at 2026-07-15, source SENTINEL-APEX-v166.2;)
items.confidence_rationale: High confidence based on: CVSS score 9.8 (Critical); EPSS score 0.352 (elevated exploitation probability)
items.recommended_sla_action: URGENT PATCH — Critical severity, deploy fix within 72 hours
items._tier_notice: Upgrade to PRO for full enrichment: actor attribution, kill chain, IOC hashes, AI analysis, STIX bundle.

items.title: CVE-2026-44745: SAP Approuter does not properly validate incoming request headers during the OAuth2 login flow under certain configurati
items.description: SAP Approuter does not properly validate incoming request headers during the OAuth2 login flow under certain configurations. This allows an unauthenticated remote attacker to craft a malicious link which, when clicked by a victim, could lead to unauthorized access. Successful exploitation results in a high impact to the confidentiality and integrity with no impact on the availability of the application.

items.title: CVE-2026-58233: SAP Change and Transport System Attach Tool (ctsattach) allows an authenticated attacker to supply a specially crafted a
items.description: SAP Change and Transport System Attach Tool (ctsattach) allows an authenticated attacker to supply a specially crafted archive file which, when processed by the applications library, can trigger insecure deserialization and lead to remote code execution (RCE) on the system. Successful exploitation requires a victim to process the malicious archive, enabling the attacker to execute the RCE and extract sensitive information and gain control over the system and its processes. This vulnerability has a high impact on confidentiality and integrity of the data, with a low impact on the availability of the system.

items.title: CVE-2026-11802: The FoodBook Lite - Online Food Ordering System plugin for WordPress is vulnerable to Missing Authorization in all versi
items.description: The FoodBook Lite - Online Food Ordering System plugin for WordPress is vulnerable to Missing Authorization in all versions up to, and including, 1.5.6. The registration() function, accessible via the wp_ajax_nopriv_registration_action AJAX action, lacks any nonce verification or capability check, and does not check the WordPress users_can_register option before calling wp_insert_user(). This makes it possible for unauthenticated attackers to create new user accounts with the 'customer' role and receive authentication cookies, even when the site administrator has explicitly disabled user registration.

items.title: CVE-2026-44752: SAP NetWeaver Application Server Java allows an unauthenticated attacker to inject malicious JavaScript through crafted
items.description: SAP NetWeaver Application Server Java allows an unauthenticated attacker to inject malicious JavaScript through crafted URLs. When a victim accesses such a URL, the script executes in the user's browser, allowing the attacker to access sensitive session information and modify non-sensitive data displayed in the clients browser. This results in a high impact on confidentiality, low impact on integrity with no impact on availability of the application.
